variants.title: Fleetguard AF897 Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the Donaldson P181142
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF897 premium axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.

variants.title: Donaldson P181142 Air Primary, Round
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P181142 Air Primary, Round provides clean, efficient airflow for engines by trapping airborne contaminants. Its round design maximizes filtration surface area while maintaining high airflow rates. Perfect for heavy-duty applications, this air primary filter enhances engine longevity and supports consistent performance.
